title: Dimensions of Alex's Caves
description: Add dimensions for Alex's Caves mod.
body:
# Dimensions of Alex's Caves  

A simple mod that adds several dimensions to **Alex's Caves**, making it easier for players to explore originally rare **cave biomes**.  

Follow the crafting method shown in the image below to create items for traveling between these dimensions and the Overworld:  

![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a1332af5f8948e49b638d96a5706760f8cbe794.png)

## License

This mod is open-sourced under the **MIT License**.

You may include it in your modpacks/servers as long as you **comply with the license terms**.
